use_cases: Displaying virtual or physical credit card information in fintech applications
Showcasing branded payment cards with dynamic 3D effects in banking dashboards
Creating interactive payment method selectors in checkout flows
Displaying loyalty or membership cards with cosmic visual theming
Enhancing e-commerce checkout with premium-feeling card selection UI
ai_summary: A cosmic-themed 3D credit card component with real-time cursor tracking and perspective rotation effects. Features a glass-morphism aesthetic with nebula-inspired gradients, glow effects, and smooth hover animations. The card responds to mouse movement with dynamic 3D transforms and continuously animates with a subtle swaying motion when idle. Highly customizable with theme colors, logo text, and dimensions.
